---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project or a biophysical feature.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Scientific / Academic Context
Why is this feature important? Please provide any relevant context from structural biology, bioinformatics, or machine learning (e.g., referencing a specific paper or method).

## Proposed Implementation (Optional)
If you have an idea of how this feature might be implemented, describe it here.

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
